name: leverage-intelligence
description: Expert Agent Layer Phase 1 — separate workflow from intelligence in skills via instruction-based expert agent patterns

tasks.title: Define Expert Agent Patterns in PATTERNS.md
tasks.description: Create three new patterns: context_bundle_assembly (how to assemble context bundles with token budget limits, sparse fallback, reuse rules), significance_analyst (what actually matters — with worked before/after example and grounding directives), relationship_intelligence (what changed in relationships — with worked example). Each pattern needs Purpose, Used by, Inputs, Steps, Outputs, and worked examples.
acceptanceCriteria: Three patterns documented in PATTERNS.md following existing pattern format
Each has Purpose, Used by, Inputs, Steps, Outputs

context_bundle_assembly includes concrete CLI commands, word limits per section (strategy 3 files/300w, memory 5 results/200w, person stances+items+health only), priority trim order, sparse-context fallback, topic derivation method, reuse rules for get_meeting_context
Each expert agent pattern includes worked example with abbreviated bundle, bad output (keyword-matched), good output (context-reasoned with bundle citations)
Significance Analyst includes grounding directive: cite specific goal/decision/stance for each candidate

tasks.title: Update process-meetings Step 7 with Significance Analyst
tasks.description: Redesign Step 7 (extract_decisions_learnings pattern call to workspace memory) to use Significance Analyst with context bundle. Step 4 (extraction to meeting file) is NOT changed. Add context bundle assembly between Steps 6 and 7. Make two-destination split explicit.
acceptanceCriteria: process-meetings SKILL.md Step 7 updated with context bundle assembly and Significance Analyst
Step 4 extraction to meeting file is unchanged
Context bundle assembly instructions reference context_bundle_assembly pattern
Extraction instructions distinguish commitments from descriptions
Candidates include reasoning citing specific context
Two-destination split explicit: Step 4 to file, Step 7 to memory via Significance Analyst

tasks.title: Update meeting-prep with Relationship Intelligence
tasks.description: Add Relationship Intelligence phase after get_meeting_context gathering. Adds Intelligence Insights section. Reuses context from get_meeting_context — does NOT re-run arete people show.
acceptanceCriteria: meeting-prep SKILL.md updated with Relationship Intelligence phase after context gathering
Adds Intelligence Insights section: relationship changes, topics needing attention, recommended approach
References context_bundle_assembly and relationship_intelligence patterns
Existing prep brief structure preserved; intelligence is additive
Reuses people context from get_meeting_context — no duplicate arete people show calls

tasks.title: Update week-review with Significance Analyst
tasks.description: Add Significance Analyst phase for weekly significance assessment. Context bundle LIMITED to goals + memory only. Do NOT add arete people show calls.
acceptanceCriteria: week-review SKILL.md updated with Significance Analyst phase
Adds Weekly Intelligence section: significant events, patterns, strategic connections
Context bundle limited to goals context and memory search ONLY
NO arete people show calls added
Existing review structure preserved; intelligence is additive

tasks.title: Update extract_decisions_learnings pattern and authoring guide
tasks.description: Update extract_decisions_learnings to reference significance_analyst with conditional fallback for bundle-less callers. Update _authoring-guide.md with one new section on expert agent patterns. Must read finalize-project/SKILL.md first to verify backward compatibility.
acceptanceCriteria: extract_decisions_learnings pattern updated to reference significance_analyst with conditional: use analyst when bundle available, else keyword scan
finalize-project SKILL.md read and impact assessed before updating
Pattern includes conditional language for bundle-less callers
_authoring-guide.md updated with one new section on expert agent patterns (bounded update)
Cross-references between patterns are bidirectional
finalize-project confirmed to produce coherent output after change
